summary: Agents Module (Phase 4 Strangler Fig) testing completed. All 21 backend API tests passed. The new modular agents routes from /app/backend/routes/agents.py are working correctly with USE_NEW_AGENTS_ROUTES=true.
critical_code_review_comments: Agents module extraction is clean and follows Strangler Fig pattern correctly
routes/agents.py properly imports from services/agent_service.py and services/auth_service.py
Feature flag USE_NEW_AGENTS_ROUTES=true correctly routes to new modular agents routes
User isolation is properly enforced - users can only access their own agents
All CRUD operations work correctly: Create, Read (list/single), Update, Delete
Voice management endpoints work: preset voices list, cloned voices list, agent voice update
Service injection pattern (set_services) properly injects eleven_client, check_subscription_limit_fn, get_tier_features_fn, VoiceSettings
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from responses using {'_id': 0} projection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agents module (Phase 4 Strangler Fig) fully tested. New modular routes in /app/backend/routes/agents.py and /app/backend/services/agent_service.py are working correctly. Feature flag USE_NEW_AGENTS_ROUTES=true in backend/.env enables the new routes. All agents endpoints tested: CRUD operations, voice presets, cloned voices, agent voice settings update. User isolation verified - users can only see/modify their own agents. Note: Voice cloning endpoint (/api/voices/clone) was not tested as it requires ElevenLabs Pro subscription and actual audio files.

tests: Returns list of ElevenLabs preset voices
Includes Rachel, Josh, and other preset voices
Update agent voice settings with preset voice
User cannot access other user's agent
User cannot update other user's agent
User cannot delete other user's agent
Users see only their own agents in list

skipped_tests.POST /api/voices/clone: Requires ElevenLabs Pro subscription and actual audio files
skipped_tests.POST /api/voices/preview: Requires ElevenLabs API and generates audio
